Interactive Acoustic Analysis

Anchor the ADHD Mind

Discover how 8D spatial audio uses bilateral stimulation to satisfy the brain's craving for distraction, locking your foreground attention onto deep work.

Launch AI Generator Explore the Data

The Bilateral Anchor

ADHD brains often have an under-stimulated prefrontal cortex, causing a constant search for novel stimuli. 8D audio provides continuous, predictable movement that occupies this background craving.

〰️ The "Window Wiper" Effect

Smooth panning from left to right ear activates alternating brain hemispheres, grounding the nervous system similar to EMDR therapy.

⚡ Optimal Arousal

Acts as a physiological "fidget spinner," keeping dopamine baseline high enough to prevent your attention from wandering.

Focus Stability Over Time

Theoretical Model

Deconstructing the Sound

"8D" is just a marketing term for specific acoustic manipulations. Click the chart below to isolate the parameters required to instruct an AI audio model.

⏣

Interactive Profile

Select any segment of the acoustic radar on the left. This will reveal the specific audio engineering parameters needed to recreate the ADHD-focusing effect.

Generate optimized prompts for AI audio tools (Suno, Udio, AudioLDM) to create your own focus tracks.
